name: 2026-05-21 Economic & Utility Reform Internet Faster Still Broken TH
description:
The internet keeps getting faster. It still stops working the moment you actually need it.

The speed score climbs. Then the call drops mid-meeting, the GCash payment fails at the counter, the signal dies the second it rains.

Mabilis nga, hangga't hindi mo kailangan. Then nothing.

A speed test measures megabits. It will never measure the moment it mattered.

The internet keeps getting faster. It still stops working the moment you actually need it.

The speed score climbs. Then the call drops mid-meeting, the GCash payment fails at the counter, the signal dies the second it rains.

Mabilis nga, hangga't hindi mo kailangan. Then nothing.

PH 'regulate internet quality not speed' cycle: CitizenWatch Philippines urged regulators/ISPs to focus on service quality over headline speed (Philstar, 23 Jan 2026); ISPs urged to ensure connection stability not just speed (Inquirer); President Marcos said internet speed is not a sole indicator of progress (Philstar, 20 Feb 2026).
